modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to login to Coyote applications due to Shibboleth error

full_description_text: 
I was trying to access Coyote Connections and Qualtrics but encountered an error. The application displayed a Shibboleth 500 Error, stating that the request was unsupported. This issue prevents me from logging into the necessary systems for my work.
short_description: Unable to login to Coyote applications due to Shibboleth error
description: I was trying to access Coyote Connections and Qualtrics but encountered an error. The application displayed a Shibboleth 500 Error, stating that the request was unsupported. This issue prevents me from logging into the necessary systems for my work.
